channel.title: Cybersecurity News Aggregator
channel.description: Latest cybersecurity news from top sources
channel.comment: News aggregated from: Cointelegraph - Security, Threatpost, Bleeping Computer, Dark Reading, Blockthreat, CryptoPotato, CryptoSlate, Krebs On Security, The Hacker News, Coindesk, GroupIB Blog, Data Breach Today, CNN.com - Crypto News, DataBreaches.net

item.title: Microsoft to stop Exchange 2016 / 2019 security updates in October
item.description: Microsoft has reminded customers that it will stop shipping security updates for Exchange 2016 and 2019 through the Extended Security Update (ESU) program in October. [...]...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: Bitcoin retreats from one-month high as oil tops $85, inflation concerns resurface
item.description: BTC retreated from a one-month high as WTI crude topped $85 for the first time since June, reigniting inflation concerns and pushing investors toward gold, silver and the safety of bitcoin over altcoi...
item.dc:creator: Coindesk

item.title: As Bitcoin breaches $66K its latest bottom signal trapped buyers in a 20% loss

item.title: Balance stablecoin collapses 99% after $1 million exploit drains its bitcoin vaults
item.description: An attacker fed the lending system a fake, abnormally low bitcoin price, liquidated vaults that should have been safe, and pocketed the difference in a single transaction....
item.dc:creator: Coindesk

item.title: Live updates: Bitcoin under $66,000 as traders await Alphabet earnings to gauge AI trade
item.description: A two-day chip rebound stalled ahead of Alphabet's earnings in a sign of whether the hundreds of billions going into AI is paying off. Bitcoin has tracked that trade all month....

item.title: Microsoft Azure DevOps MCP Flaw Lets Hidden PR Comments Hijack AI Review Agents
